title: aster amellus subsp. amellus
intro: Aster amellus subsp. amellus, also known as the Nootka or Michaelmas daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, Aster amellus subsp. amellus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat colds, fever, and other minor ailments.
